page.overview.title: Portfolio Overview
page.overview.welcome_desc: It looks like you don't have any assets yet. Start by importing data or adding positions manually.
page.securities.title: Your positions
page.cash.title: Cash Management
page.connectors.title: Connectors
page.connectors.desc: Import your data from various sources.
page.connectors.csv_excel_desc: Import positions or cash operations from .csv, .xlsx, or .xls files.
page.connectors.broker_scraping_desc: Automatically import data from your broker's website.
web_connector.title: Web Connector
web_connector.subtitle: Automatically import data from your broker or bank website.
web_connector.select_profile_desc: Choose the broker or bank you want to import data from.
web_connector.credentials_notice: Your credentials are used only for this session and are never stored. A visible browser window will open so you can monitor the process and complete any 2FA verification if needed.
web_connector.running_desc: A browser window should be open. Please complete any 2FA verification if prompted.
connector.select_import_type: Select what you want to import:
connector.csv_delimiter_note: Only relevant for CSV files. Excel files ignore this setting.
connector.drag_drop: Drag and drop or click to upload
page.settings.title: Settings
settings.asset_colors_desc: Choose the color used to represent each asset type in charts and allocation views.
settings.language_desc: Choose the display language for the application.
dialog.add_cash.title: Add Cash Entry
dialog.add_cash.desc: Enter the details for your new cash entry.
dialog.edit_cash.title: Edit Cash Entry
dialog.edit_cash.desc: Update the balance for this cash entry.
dialog.delete_cash.title: Delete Cash Entry
dialog.delete_cash.desc: Are you sure you want to delete this cash entry? This action cannot be undone.
dialog.add_position.title: Add New Position
dialog.add_position.desc: Search by ticker or company name.
dialog.edit_position.title: Edit Position
dialog.add_operation.title: Add Cash Operation
dialog.add_operation.desc: Enter the details for the deposit or expense.
dialog.edit_operation.title: Edit Operation
dialog.delete_operation.title: Delete Operation
dialog.delete_operation.desc: Are you sure you want to delete this operation? This action cannot be undone.
dialog.add_dividend.title: Add Dividend
dialog.edit_dividend.title: Edit Dividend
label.title: Title
page.about.title: About Patrimony
page.about.intro: Patrimony is a free, open-source portfolio tracker that helps you monitor your investments and cash holdings in one place. It runs entirely on your machine — your financial data never leaves your computer.
page.about.feature_track: Track stocks, ETFs, crypto, commodities, and cash accounts with real-time prices.
page.about.feature_import: Import positions and operations from CSV or Excel files.
page.about.feature_charts: Visualize your wealth over time with interactive charts and allocation breakdowns.
page.about.feature_multi_currency: Multi-currency support with automatic exchange-rate conversion.
page.about.feature_i18n: Available in English, French, and Spanish.
page.about.github_desc: Patrimony is open source. Contributions, bug reports, and feature requests are welcome!
page.properties.title: Your Properties
dialog.add_property.title: Add Property
dialog.add_property.desc: Enter the details for your physical asset.
label.name: Name
empty.securities: No securities yet. Add your first position to get started!
empty.cash: No cash accounts yet. Add your first account to get started!
empty.properties: No properties yet. Add your first asset to get started!
settings.show_browser: Show browser window during web import
settings.show_browser_desc: When enabled, the browser window will be visible so you can monitor the automation and complete 2FA.
settings.reset_password_desc: This will delete your master password and all saved connector credentials. You will need to set up a new master password and re-enter credentials.
notification.title: Events
connector.map_columns_desc: Link each column from your file to the corresponding data field.
connector.unknown_tickers: The following tickers were not found in the reference database. Please assign an asset type for each:
connector.unknown_accounts: The following account numbers don't exist yet. Please provide a bank name and currency for each:
connector.no_active: No active connectors yet. Use one of the connectors above to import your portfolio data.
connector.unlock_credentials_desc: Enter your master password to unlock stored credentials.
web_connector.setup_master_desc: Create a master password to securely store your broker credentials. You can skip this if you prefer to enter credentials each time.
web_connector.unlock_vault_desc: Enter your master password to access saved credentials.
web_connector.browser_notice: A browser window will open so you can monitor the process and complete any 2FA verification if needed.
